_note: Bundled Google OAuth Desktop client credentials. Per Google's OAuth2 docs, the client_secret for an installed-app client is not actually treated as secret (https://developers.google.com/identity/protocols/oauth2#installed). End users get the standard Google consent screen and never need to touch Cloud Console. To use a different client, save your own google.json under $ACCOUNTPILOT_CONFIG_DIR/oauth_clients/google.json and AccountPilot will prefer it.
